text: You can explicitly confirm you want to schedule the task when prompted by Claude by clicking “Schedule": Claude will create and schedule your task, and it will be added to the “Scheduled tasks” page. Claude will create and schedule your task, and it will be added to the “Scheduled tasks” page. From the “Scheduled tasks” page Click “Scheduled” in the left sidebar. Click “Scheduled” in the left sidebar. Click “+ New task” in the upper right. Click “+ New task” in the upper right. In the Create scheduled task modal, enter the following information: Task name Description of the task The prompt describing what your task does. Note: Type "/" to include plugins and Skills. How frequently the task will run (hourly, daily, weekly, on weekdays, or manually) The model you want to use [optional] Which folder Claude should work in [optional] In the Create scheduled task modal, enter the following information: Task name Task name Description of the task Description of the task The prompt describing what your task does. Note: Type "/" to include plugins and Skills. The prompt describing what your task does. Note: Type "/" to include plugins and Skills. Note: Type "/" to include plugins and Skills. How frequently the task will run (hourly, daily, weekly, on weekdays, or manually) How frequently the task will run (hourly, daily, weekly, on weekdays, or manually) The model you want to use [optional] The model you want to use [optional] Which folder Claude should work in [optional] Which folder Claude should work in [optional] Click “Save” to add a new task to the Scheduled tasks page. Click “Save” to add a new task to the Scheduled tasks page. Manage your scheduled tasks To view and manage all your scheduled tasks, click “Scheduled” in the left sidebar. From here you can: View all the scheduled tasks you’ve created View all the scheduled tasks you’ve created Review upcoming and past runs Review upcoming and past runs Click into individual tasks to manually edit the instructions or cadence Click into individual tasks to manually edit the instructions or cadence Pause a scheduled task Pause a scheduled task Resume a paused task Resume a paused task Delete a scheduled task Delete a scheduled task Run a task on demand Run a task on demand
